parameters.query:
SELECT
      pr."project_id"          AS project_id
    , pr."name"                AS project_name
    , p."plan_id"              AS plan_id
    , p."plan_name"            AS plan_name
    , p."plan_url"             AS plan_image_url
    , sup."set_up_position_id" AS pin_id
    , sup."post_number"        AS pos_number
    , sup."pos_x"              AS pos_x
    , sup."pos_y"              AS pos_y
FROM public."PROJECT" pr
JOIN public."PLAN" p
  ON p."project_id" = pr."project_id"
 AND COALESCE(p."is_delete", FALSE) = FALSE
LEFT JOIN public."SET_UP_POSITION" sup
  ON sup."plan_id" = p."plan_id"
WHERE pr."company_id" = 177
  AND COALESCE(pr."is_delete", FALSE) = FALSE
ORDER BY
      pr."name"
    , p."plan_name"
    , sup."post_number";
